name: orchestrate
description: Multi-agent coding orchestrator for AI coding agents. Drives whole-codebase build/fix/audit/refactor work through a structured multi-stage planning lifecycle backed by a docs/ single source of truth the skill auto-maintains (evidence, findings, CHANGELOG, ROADMAP), an expanded subagent squad (explorer, implementer, verifier, UI runtime tester, DB prober), a project-independent browser-driven UI/UX test swarm, fail-safe automation hooks, and a library of verification-gated launcher commands (feature build, frontend, resilient component, debug, refactor, README, gitignore, session handoff, read-only DB audit, Grafana panels, M365/Graph identity, vendor security assessment, endpoint hardening) that all share one neutral Operating Contract. Plus /orc-prompt to turn vague requests into structured, environment-aware specs.
